item.title: My Reno Rules: Emma & Michelle and Julia & Nathan go head-to-head amid accusations of idea stealing

item.description: ‘Nobody should go to work and never come back.’

item.title: The Agenda Setters stocks after R7: Buy, hold and sell
item.description: ‘That is not what they brought.’

item.title: Would you eat this? Woolworths shoppers divided over marked-down pack of grey-toned mince
item.description: From ‘already rotten’ to ‘still safe to eat’, the off-colour mince has sparked a beef online.

item.description: ‘Decisions like that feel like they just set us back.’

item.description: ‘Australia is such a crazy place, man.’

item.description: Two men trained in martial arts stepped in until police arrived.

item.description: ‘It is in the wrong place, at the wrong time, for too long.’

item.title: New advice on catch-up moves to start building wealth in your 40s, 50s and beyond
item.description: ‘It’s never too late.’

item.title: Four minutes of daily movement could help prevent type 2 diabetes, study finds
item.description: A new study reveals the surprisingly simple daily habit that could slash your risk of type 2 diabetes by more than a third.

item.title: Ripper GC general manager Nick Adams debunks ‘panic’ myth surrounding future of LIV Golf
item.description: ‘That’s the only information I have at this stage.’

item.title: King and a joker: Charles disarms US hosts with quips at state dinner in Washington
item.description: ‘King George never set foot in America and, please rest assured, I am not here as part of some cunning rearguard action.’

item.title: Marnus Labuschagne celebrates emotional win over fellow Aussies in Pakistan Super League
item.description: ‘It’s really hard to put into words what it means for the franchise.’

item.description: The Lions co-captain still recalls the three questions he was asked by the first-time coach.

item.title: Saudi Arabia to pull funding for LIV Golf, according to Wall Street Journal
item.description: Players are set to be informed of the situation this week.

item.title: Olympic hero Benjamin Karl faces backlash as ‘macho’ marriage comments ignite firestorm
item.description: The controversy began when the snowboarder’s wife said she wanted to go on a girls’ trip.

item.title: Cathy MacGuinness: Husband’s heartbreaking tribute to Sydney mother-of-three who died weeks after giving birth
item.description: The 40-year-old died of cardiac arrest linked to an undiagnosed heart condition, prompting a warning to women.

item.title: Much-loved Queensland jockey Shane McGovern undergoes second leg amputation in ‘devastating’ update
item.description: The ‘tough as nails’ Aussie faces a long recovery after getting trapped under his horse in a freak accident.

item.description: ‘She wants to know why… why is she losing her hair, why does it have to be her that’s going bald?’

item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news of the tenuous ceasefire holding back conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel.

item.description: The actor died suddenly aged 57 after announcing a new role on an Australian movie production.

item.description: ‘To this day, I have complicated feelings about it.’

item.description: The pop star was arrested on a California highway last month.

item.title: Former NSW MP Rory Amon to face retrial over alleged sexual assault of teenage boy after Supreme Court jury deadloc
item.description: The 36-year-old claims he believed the 13-year-old was over the age of consent when they had sex in a car park toilet.

item.title: Dezi Freeman - The Hunt: Story of slain sovereign citizen and cop killer story uncovered in new 7NEWS podcast
item.description: A gripping new six-part investigative series from 7NEWS and LiSTNR reconstructs the hunt for Dezi Freeman — the man who murdered two police officers and vanished into the Victorian high country for seven months.

item.title: You’ll never guess who Australia’s second-fastest NBN provider is
item.description: Optus remains on top for NBN speeds, but the ACCC’s latest report shows a lower‑profile budget telco has quietly climbed into second place.

item.title: Spotlight | 7NEWS
item.description: The latest in Spotlight

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Middle East war: Commercial cargo ship attacked near Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran’s grip on the critical oil passage continues to shake global markets.

item.title: Oscar Piastri completes podium charge on last laps of Miami Grand Prix as Kimi Antonelli secures hat-trick of wins
item.description: One car flipped early and the feistiness continued all the way to the chequered flag.

item.title: Three people die on Oceanwide Expeditions cruise ship amid virus outbreak
item.description: The illness has spread to other passengers on the ship, with one in intensive care.

item.title: Australian relay teams achieve extraordinary feat on medal-winning day for 4x400m squad
item.description: No other country managed to do what the Aussies just did at the global event.

item.title: Middle East war: Trump announces Project Freedom to free ships stuck in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Foreign Minister Penny Wong has weighed in on Australia’s obligations following the announcement.

item.title: ‘The last of the oil’: Fuel crisis about to get a lot worse despite Middle East war ceasefire says expert
item.description: Aussies have been warned the worst is yet to come.

item.title: Ex-AFL cult hero Mitch Robinson sent to hospital after neck scare in local footy game
item.description: ‘It was just a routine tackle, something I’ve done thousands of times.’

item.title: Robot-delivered note saves elderly woman amid escalating strikes between Ukraine and Russia
item.description: She thought she wouldn’t make it to safety, but an unmanned vehicle turned up with a spray-painted message on its side.

item.title: Supposed NDIS fraudsters syndicate allegedly found with more than $170,000 in cash, gold and silver
item.description: ‘There is nothing lower than seeking to take money from a disabled person.’

item.title: Former New York City mayor and Trump lawyer Rudy Giuliani hospitalised in critical condition
item.description: Giuliani was seen coughing and struggling to speak normally in a public appearance on Friday.

item.title: Terri Irwin reveals the biggest difference between her son Robert Irwin and late husband Steve Irwin
item.description: ‘I will say the one thing that Robert’s got that Steve didn’t.’

item.title: Olympic Sevens star Teagan Levi set for code switch after signing with NRL club Gold Coast Titans
item.description: The 22-year-old ‘with rugby league in her DNA’ is coming home.

item.title: Brody Mihocek reveals ‘insulting’ low-ball contract offer that led to shock Collingwood exit
item.description: The veteran forward ‘wasn’t happy going into the club’ during a rocky few months behind the scenes last year.

item.title: Prince William and Prince Harry feud: The ‘non-negotiable’ driving a rift between the royal brothers
item.description: According to the insider, it remains ‘a non-negotiable’ for William.

item.title: Police offer $1 million reward to help solve disappearance of Marion Barter
item.description: Barter left behind her children in ‘troubling’ circumstances nearly 30 years ago.

item.title: Sportsbet cuts ties with AFL umpire Nick Foot after tribunal controversy reignited debate over dual roles
item.description: The whistleblower has issued a statement as the tribunal saga sparks a major change.

item.title: Lynk & Co still a no-go for Australia – for now
item.description: Geely's local boss says Lynk & Co isn't in the short-term plan for the Chinese auto group here, where the focus is on the Geely and Zeekr brands.

item.title: Gogglebox star Angie Kent shares heartbreaking news about her dad following his battle with rare blood cancer
item.description: ‘I was told there was nothing left they could do.’

item.title: Federal budget 2026: One Nation’s Barnaby Joyce blasts Labor government over potential negative gearing changes
item.description: Labor minister Tanya Plibersek refused to confirm if the change is coming.

item.title: Eleven injured in collision between car and minibus on Great Ocean Rd in Gellibrand Lower
item.description: A significant detour is now in place for Victorian motorists.

item.title: 2026 Met Gala: The wildest, boldest looks from fashion’s biggest night in New York
item.description: Ahead of this year’s event kicking off, we take a look back at some of the most talked-about outfits.

item.title: Much-loved Dolphins veteran Daniel Saifiti forced to medically retire from NRL immediately
item.description: The emotional 30-year-old continues to struggle with ‘one of the worst’ injuries ever seen.

item.title: Grieving Crows captain Jordan Dawson back at training as Darcy Fogarty pushes for return
item.description: The star midfielder lost his older brother Jaryd last month.

item.title: 2026 Mitsubishi Outlander price and specs
item.description: Prices are up for the 2026 Mitsubishi Outlander, and a new blackops variant of the popular mid-size SUV has rejoined the range after a brief hiatus.

item.title: Brisbane youngster Koby Evans under investigation for alleged homophobic slur
item.description: The 18-year-old is ‘extremely remorseful’ and has apologised multiple times.

item.title: Harrowing details behind Broncos star Deine Mariner’s ‘limb-saving’ surgery emerge
item.description: The club doctor has revealed the 1.30am rush to save the player’s career.

item.title: Daughter’s plea as $1m reward announced in enduring search for Gold Coast teacher Marion Barter
item.description: The Lady Vanishes podcast team alongside Marion’s daughter uncovered a trove of new evidence that reopened the case.

item.title: Hyundai's N division is working on a cheaper performance EV
item.description: Hyundai is developing a lower-priced high-performance electric car, and has plans to make its battery-powered N models more accessible.

item.title: Gus Lamont: Police give update for missing outback missing four-year-old
item.description: ‘This is one of those tragic stories that we would like to be able to provide more clarity to.’

item.title: Epic scenes as Aussie GOAT Steph Gilmore creates more history at Gold Coast Pro
item.description: Thousands of fans flocked to Snapper Rocks to see the 38-year-old legend dominate once again.

item.title: Hyundai i20 N and i30 N hot hatches to bow out with a bang
item.description: Hyundai Australia is planning a special send-off for its high-performance N hatchbacks, both of which are set to leave showrooms next year.

item.title: 2026 Hyundai Ioniq 6 N price and specs
item.description: Hyundai's quickest production car ever has joined the local lineup, priced from $115,000 before on-road costs.

item.title: At least 10 injured in shooting at lake party in Oklahoma, more victims expected
item.description: Ten partygoers were transported to hospitals ‘in various conditions’.

item.title: Collingwood teammates hit back over ‘hate’ aimed at Scott Pendlebury’s golden jumper plan
item.description: ‘I think he can do whatever he wants and he’s earnt the right to be celebrated.’
